scope: Phase 5.6 evidence-first replay gap unblock classification packet
no_overclaim_boundary: This packet preserves insufficient_evidence and control-row diagnostics. It is not a broad backtest, profit proof, Martin Luk private-account replication, exact-fill replication, or evidence to launch T020.
t020_state: - [ ] T020 Launch bounded autoresearch only after validator, focused tests, and replay gates pass

unsafe_patch_reasons: all reviewed rows are controls rather than public replay candidate rows
none of the reviewed rows matches an exact setup_type/entry_trigger pair emitted by active_strategy.py
primitive_not_emitted rows have no matching primitive trace or series to relabel
trace_label_missing rows are diagnostic control activity; relabeling would overclaim reproduction evidence

missing_field_taxonomy.scope: Classifies parent_public_case_evidence.missing_fields and source_ledger_evidence.missing_fields for each of the 20 Phase 5.6 gap rows; these classifications are blockers, not promotion evidence.

row_gap_category.rationale: No reviewed control row has a source-backed exact setup_type/entry_trigger trace match that can be patched without overclaiming.

category_definitions.exact_date_missing: public evidence gives only a candidate date/window or lacks exact intraday/context timestamp evidence
category_definitions.setup_entry_label_missing: the current trace contract does not provide the row-required setup_type and entry_trigger match
category_definitions.fill_missing: public evidence does not expose exact entry, partial, exit, adjusted price, or size/fill details needed for reproduction
category_definitions.exit_missing: public evidence does not expose exact exit, stop-management, premature-exit, or held-benchmark evidence
category_definitions.account_context_missing: public evidence does not expose account equity, position size, portfolio sizing, or account-level context

missing_field_classifications.rationale: candidate window exists, but no source-backed exact operation date
final exit execution fill remains unavailable
source-level note combines exact dates and fills; parent-case fields provide the fill-specific blockers

row_gap_missing_field_classification.rationale: current strategy traces either do not emit a matching primitive or emit generic control activity that cannot be relabeled into public-case evidence
